requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Liberia Fire Authority Requirements and NFPA / IEC 62933 Donor-Project Expectations
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——利比里亚消防主管机关要求及NFPA / IEC 62933捐助方项目预期
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——賴比瑞亞消防主管機關要求及NFPA / IEC 62933捐助方項目預期

summary.en: Liberia does not have a confirmed single dedicated national fire safety authority publishing enforceable BESS-specific fire installation codes comparable to Qatar's QCDD or Singapore's SCDF. Fire safety oversight in Liberia falls under the Liberia National Fire Service (LNFS) and the Ministry of Internal Affairs. Given Liberia's historical alignment with US standards (including its 60 Hz grid) and the dominant role of USAID and World Bank in Liberia's electricity sector, BESS project specifications in Liberia — particularly for donor-funded utility-scale and mini-grid installations — are expected by international project developers and EPCs to reference NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) as the applicable fire-installation framework. Formal LNFS adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this gap requires direct verification with LNFS and the relevant project authority before system design is finalised. IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) may additionally be referenced in donor-project specifications. Liberia's coastal equatorial climate (high year-round humidity and temperatures) requires additional attention to thermal management, ventilation, and enclosure IP ratings for BESS installations beyond typical dry-climate baselines.
summary.zh: 利比里亚尚无经确认的单一专职国家消防安全机构发布可执行的BESS专项消防安装规范，可与卡塔尔QCDD或新加坡SCDF相当。利比里亚消防安全监管由利比里亚国家消防局（LNFS）和内政部负责。鉴于利比里亚历史上与美国标准的对接（包括其60 Hz电网）以及USAID和世界银行在利比里亚电力行业的主导地位，国际项目开发商和EPC承包商预期利比里亚BESS项目规格——尤其是捐助方资助的公用事业规模及微电网装置——将以NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）作为适用消防安装框架。截至本数据集日期，LNFS专门针对BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；此差距须在系统设计最终确定前直接向LNFS和相关项目主管机关核实。捐助方项目规格中还可能引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）。利比里亚沿海赤道气候（全年高湿度和高温）要求BESS装置在热管理、通风和机柜IP等级方面超出典型干旱气候基准给予额外关注。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞尚無經確認的單一專職國家消防安全機構發布可執行的BESS專項消防安裝規範，可與卡達QCDD或新加坡SCDF相當。賴比瑞亞消防安全監管由賴比瑞亞國家消防局（LNFS）和內政部負責。鑑於賴比瑞亞歷史上與美國標準的對接（包括其60 Hz電網）以及USAID和世界銀行在賴比瑞亞電力行業的主導地位，國際項目開發商和EPC承包商預期賴比瑞亞BESS項目規格——尤其是捐助方資助的公用事業規模及微電網裝置——將以NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）作為適用消防安裝框架。截至本數據集日期，LNFS專門針對BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；此差距須在系統設計最終確定前直接向LNFS和相關項目主管機關核實。捐助方項目規格中還可能引用IEC 62933-5-1:2024（安全考量——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）。賴比瑞亞沿海赤道氣候（全年高濕度和高溫）要求BESS裝置在熱管理、通風和機櫃IP等級方面超出典型乾旱氣候基準給予額外關注。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (expected donor-project and EPC reference for BESS fire installation in Liberia; LNFS formal adoption for BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with LNFS)
NFPA 13 — Standard for the Installation of Sprinkler Systems (expected reference for fire suppression in donor-funded projects)
NFPA 72 — National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code (expected reference for fire alarm systems in donor-funded projects)
Liberia National Fire Service (LNFS) — fire safety authority; BESS-specific mandatory requirements unconfirmed — verify directly
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (expected in donor-funded project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Liberia's LNFS or international project donors as equivalent to NFPA 855-based requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with NFPA 855-aligned design documentation for donor-project review. Additionally, Chinese BESS systems are typically designed and tested for 50 Hz grid frequency and temperate or northern-China climate baselines; thermal runaway propagation analysis and enclosure ratings must be re-evaluated for Liberia's tropical humidity and temperature conditions.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被利比里亚LNFS或国际项目捐助方认可为等同于基于NFPA 855的要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在捐助方项目审查中补充符合NFPA 855要求的设计文件。此外，中国BESS系统通常针对50 Hz电网频率及温带或华北气候基准进行设计和测试；热失控蔓延分析和机柜等级须针对利比里亚热带湿度和温度条件重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被賴比瑞亞LNFS或國際項目捐助方認可為等同於基於NFPA 855的要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在捐助方項目審查中補充符合NFPA 855要求的設計文件。此外，中國BESS系統通常針對50 Hz電網頻率及溫帶或華北氣候基準進行設計和測試；熱失控蔓延分析和機櫃等級須針對賴比瑞亞熱帶濕度和溫度條件重新評估。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Liberia does not have a confirmed BESS-specific fire installation code; however, donor-funded projects (USAID, World Bank, IFC) and international EPCs operating in Liberia are expected to apply NFPA 855 as the de facto standard for stationary BESS fire safety. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy NFPA 855-based donor-project requirements. Project teams should: (a) confirm directly with LNFS and the relevant project authority whether NFPA 855 or another fire code applies to the specific installation; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances; (c) ensure enclosures are rated for tropical humidity and temperature (typically IP54 or higher; operating temperature range extended to 45°C+ ambient for Liberia coastal locations); (d) re-evaluate thermal management and cooling design for Liberia's tropical equatorial climate — Chinese manufacturer default ratings may not cover sustained high-humidity, high-temperature operation; (e) engage a fire protection engineer familiar with NFPA standards for design review; (f) confirm suppression system equipment certification requirements with the project owner.
gap.zh: 差距：利比里亚尚无经确认的BESS专项消防安装规范；然而，在利比里亚运营的捐助方资助项目（USAID、世界银行、IFC）和国际EPC承包商预计将以NFPA 855作为固定式BESS消防安全的事实标准。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足基于NFPA 855的捐助方项目要求。项目团队应：（a）直接向LNFS和相关项目主管机关确认NFPA 855或其他消防规范是否适用于具体装置；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离；（c）确保机柜达到热带湿度和温度额定值（通常IP54或以上；利比里亚沿海地点运行温度范围扩展至环境温度45°C以上）；（d）针对利比里亚热带赤道气候重新评估热管理和冷却设计——中国制造商默认额定值可能未涵盖持续高湿度、高温运行；（e）聘请熟悉NFPA标准的消防工程师进行设计审查；（f）向项目业主确认抑制系统设备认证要求。
gap.zht: 差距：賴比瑞亞尚無經確認的BESS專項消防安裝規範；然而，在賴比瑞亞運營的捐助方資助項目（USAID、世界銀行、IFC）和國際EPC承包商預計將以NFPA 855作為固定式BESS消防安全的事實標準。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足基於NFPA 855的捐助方項目要求。項目團隊應：（a）直接向LNFS和相關項目主管機關確認NFPA 855或其他消防規範是否適用於具體裝置；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離；（c）確保機櫃達到熱帶濕度和溫度額定值（通常IP54或以上；賴比瑞亞沿海地點運行溫度範圍擴展至環境溫度45°C以上）；（d）針對賴比瑞亞熱帶赤道氣候重新評估熱管理和冷却設計——中國製造商默認額定值可能未涵蓋持續高濕度、高溫運行；（e）聘請熟悉NFPA標準的消防工程師進行設計審查；（f）向項目業主確認抑制系統設備認證要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for donor-funded BESS projects in Liberia where project owner or EPC specifications require NFPA 855-aligned fire safety design; LNFS formal adoption of NFPA 855 for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with LNFS
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements; 50 Hz and temperate-climate design baselines do not transfer to Liberia

source.publisher: National Fire Protection Association (NFPA) — NFPA 855 Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed BESS-specific fire installation code has been identified for Liberia from official sources as of the dataset date; however, NFPA 855 is the expected de facto technical baseline for donor-funded and internationally financed BESS projects. Chinese GB-standard fire documentation does not satisfy NFPA 855-based project requirements. Engage LNFS and the project owner at the earliest stage to confirm the applicable fire code and design requirements. Additionally, re-evaluate all thermal management and enclosure specifications for Liberia's tropical equatorial climate — Chinese baseline ratings for temperate conditions are insufficient for sustained coastal Liberian deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认利比里亚的BESS专项消防安装规范；然而，NFPA 855是捐助方资助和国际融资BESS项目预期的事实技术基准。中国GB标准消防文件不满足基于NFPA 855的项目要求。应在最早阶段与LNFS和项目业主接触，确认适用消防规范和设计要求。此外，须针对利比里亚热带赤道气候重新评估所有热管理和机柜规格——针对温带条件的中国基准额定值不足以支持利比里亚沿海地区持续部署。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認賴比瑞亞的BESS專項消防安裝規範；然而，NFPA 855是捐助方資助和國際融資BESS項目預期的事實技術基準。中國GB標準消防文件不滿足基於NFPA 855的項目要求。應在最早階段與LNFS和項目業主接觸，確認適用消防規範和設計要求。此外，須針對賴比瑞亞熱帶赤道氣候重新評估所有熱管理和機櫃規格——針對溫帶條件的中國基準額定值不足以支持賴比瑞亞沿海地區持續部署。
